message:
perf(fwc): try filtered catalog load before full scan in 8 dispatch functions

Optimize show, ops, schema, examples, config, suggest, template, and
validate dispatch paths to try DiscoveryCatalog::load_for_connector_filter()
first, falling back to the full DiscoveryCatalog::load() only when
the filtered catalog can't resolve the connector (e.g. prefix/alias
lookups like "gith" -> "github").

Also simplify resolve_live_auth to use the new claims.get_principal_id()
accessor instead of inline FCP2 claim fallback, and fix
confusion_unknown_flag_shows_similar_flags test to use ["fwc", "list",
"--vrsion"] since bare fwc --vrsion now enters quickstart flow.

Adds 8 *_preserves_prefix_resolution tests verifying prefix lookups
continue to work through the fast-path optimization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
